summary: This is a Taraweeh prayer recitation from Ramadan 2025 at the Muslim Community Center of Tucson. The transcript captures multiple complete Quranic recitations performed during the nightly congregational prayers, including portions of Surah Az-Zumar (Chapter 39), Surah Ghafir (Chapter 40), Surah Fussilat (Chapter 41), and other chapters. The recitation includes the complete Surah Al-Fatihah (the Opening) repeated multiple times as part of the prayer structure, takbir (glorification of Allah), and the Quran being recited in the traditional melodic style characteristic of Taraweeh prayers.
